overall.description: First-person driving footage through a cyberpunk city at night during heavy rain. The player navigates narrow construction alleys and neon-lit billboard canyons in Cyberpunk 2077, passing massive holographic advertisements before emerging into darker industrial districts.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow construction alley with overhead scaffolding and debris

events.description: passes under overhead industrial walkway temporarily blocking sky view

agents.ego_description: navigating slowly through tight construction corridor with metal scaffolding on both sides

entered.detail: rusted metal framework forming a tunnel-like corridor overhead
scattered rubble and construction materials stacked along the right wall
metal catwalk structure spanning the alley between buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle moves through a narrow, enclosed construction alley with metal scaffolding forming a tunnel overhead. Debris piles line the right side while dim red neon lights glow in the distance. The space is sheltered from the rain by the overhead structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical billboard canyon with holographic advertisements

events.description: exits covered scaffolding area into open-air street with large holographic billboards
bright cyan and magenta holographic billboards illuminate the street and vehicle interior

agents.ego_description: cruising through neon-lit corridor passing tall holographic advertisements on the left

entered.detail: tall vertical holographic display showing fashion advertisements with cyan lighting
vertical advertisement tower with corporate branding and product displays

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a narrow street lined with massive holographic billboards. The Jinguji fashion advertisement dominates the left side with its bright cyan holographic display, while rain begins to streak across the windshield. The scaffolding gives way to open sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide intersection area with corporate holographic towers

events.description: heavy rain becomes more visible against the bright billboard lighting
passing the Zetatech tower into wider intersection with Cirrus billboard visible

agents.ego_description: driving past massive Zetatech corporate tower and approaching Cirrus advertisement in heavy rain

entered.detail: massive vertical holographic structure displaying corporate advertisements and product images
large pink and white advertisement for Cirrus products on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The street widens as the vehicle passes the towering Zetatech holographic advertisement on the left. Heavy rain falls through the neon-lit air, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere. The Cirrus billboard appears on the right as the Maxtac sign recedes behind the vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial district with heavy rainfall and minimal neon lighting

events.description: neon billboards fade from view leaving only dim ambient lighting and heavy rain
visibility decreases significantly due to dense rain and atmospheric fog

agents.ego_description: navigating through dark industrial area with heavy rain reducing visibility to silhouettes

entered.detail: dark silhouettes of industrial buildings and warehouses lining the open road
dense atmospheric fog and rain obscuring distant details and creating light beams

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges into a wide-open industrial area where the neon billboards have faded, leaving only the dark silhouettes of warehouse structures. Heavy rain dominates the visual field, with fog reducing visibility. The scene becomes much darker and more ominous as the drive continues through the downpour.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, industrial corridor into a vibrant, rain-slicked neon canyon. It begins by navigating a narrow construction alley where metal scaffolding forms a claustrophobic tunnel overhead and dim red neon glows amidst piles of debris. As the vehicle moves forward, the overhead structures give way to an open sky, allowing heavy rain to begin streaking across the windshield. The scene then expands into a narrow street dominated by massive holographic billboards, most notably a bright cyan Jinguji fashion advertisement that illuminates the left side of the frame.

The shot follows a continuous drive from a vibrant, neon-saturated commercial corridor into a bleak and oppressive industrial wasteland. It begins as the street widens, passing a towering Zetatech holographic advertisement on the left while a Cirrus billboard emerges on the right and the Maxtac sign recedes. As the vehicle pushes forward through the heavy rain, the brilliant neon lights gradually fade, giving way to the dark silhouettes of warehouse structures. The scene then shifts into a wide-open industrial area where the atmosphere becomes significantly darker and more ominous. Finally, the visibility drops as dense fog and a relentless downpour swallow the remaining light, leaving the camera to navigate a void of gray and black.
